purpose: Detailed machine-readable snapshot of the single current executable session.

currentSession.title: Implement GameRewritten export profile
currentSession.objective: Copy all approved draft assets from <output_dir>/drafts/ into <output_dir>/exports/gamerewritten/Content/Audio/<type>/, using targetImportPath from .provenance.json sidecars as the canonical destination name.
currentSession.whyItMatters: Generated assets currently live in drafts/ only. The GameRewritten consuming repo needs them placed in Content/Audio/ by stable name. Without an export step, the factory cannot produce a deployable deliverable.

minimum: one /tmp smoke run confirming export files land in Content/Audio/<type>/ by targetImportPath name

doneCriteriaSummary: CLI command copies drafts/<type>/ to exports/gamerewritten/Content/Audio/<type>/ using targetImportPath filename.
Command writes an export manifest listing source and destination paths.
Existing drafts/ content is not modified or deleted.
Tests verify file copying, destination names, and export manifest.
Command returns non-zero if no drafts exist to export.

nextSession.title: Add approval workflow (promote drafts to approved/)

fixturePolicy: Use the committed example artifacts under docs/AI_FACTORY/EXAMPLES/gamerewritten_vertical_slice/ as the default fixtures.
Use generated /tmp outputs (drafts/ + .provenance.json sidecars) as realistic export inputs where needed.
blockerNotes: If docs/AI_FACTORY/INTEGRATION/GAMEREWRITTEN.md is absent or incomplete, use Content/Audio/<type>/ as the conservative target path layout.
Do not delete or overwrite drafts/ contents — export is a copy operation only.
